name_en: Bottega Veneta—Color-Block Series BV Loop Camera Bag 💥, the best value for money. Large woven texture + consistently high-quality calfskin. Features a zipper and adjustable drawstring. The 'small belly' is surprisingly spacious 💫, holds everything, and is very lightweight. Suitable for girls of all ages.
